!pan-os-bpa-get-job-results task_id=b0539068-e1c1-496c-9dfd-a1274947f76e check_id=104,105 check_name="Accelerated Aging"
Context Example
#
{
"PAN-OS-BPA"
:

outputs.description: The submitted job ID. PAN-OS-BPA.JobResults.Status The job status in the queue (in progress or completed).
outputs.name: PAN-OS-BPA.JobResults.JobID

outputs.description: The list of checks. InfoFile.Name File name.
outputs.name: PAN-OS-BPA.JobResults.Checks

outputs.description: File entry ID. InfoFile.Size File size.
outputs.name: InfoFile.EntryID

outputs.description: File type, e.g., "PE" InfoFile.Info Basic information of the file.
outputs.name: InfoFile.Type
